'''Beel Acton''' was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who grew up on [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal IV]] as the son of a businessman.

==Biography==
Acton was always a cruel and evil child, especially after his mother died when he was three years old. He used his [[Force power/Legends|Force powers]] to subtly control people so that they would still like him, no matter how cruel he was. In his teens, a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] attempted to recruit him, but he refused. When his father lay [[Death/Legends|dying]], Acton secretly finished him off so that he would obtain all of his family's money. He then proceeded to roam [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], causing others pain and suffering using [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. He was also searching for the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]], and longed to join them.<ref name="UA" />
